flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lenoir-Rhyne University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lenoir-Rhyne University fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($41.5k → $31.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lenoir-Rhyne University fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($41.5k → $31.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Lenoir-Rhyne University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (62.1% → 75.5%).
